# New-AuditLogger

## Description

Creates an AuditLogger instance.

## Examples

### Example 1
```powershell
$audit = New-AuditLogger -Category 'maintenance'
```

## Original Comment-Based Help

```powershell
        Creates an AuditLogger instance.

    .EXAMPLE

```
